channel.title: GitHub Shell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Shell in GitHub

item.title: dokku/dokku
item.description: A docker-powered PaaS that helps you build and manage the lifecycle of applications

item.title: nvm-sh/nvm
item.description: Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

item.title: asdf-vm/asdf
item.description: Extendable version manager with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang & more

item.title: awslabs/git-secrets
item.description: Prevents you from committing secrets and credentials into git repositories

item.title: QwenLM/Qwen2.5
item.description: Qwen2.5 is the large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

item.title: oracle/docker-images
item.description: Official source of container configurations, images, and examples for Oracle products and projects

item.title: acmesh-official/acme.sh
item.description: A pure Unix shell script implementing ACME client protocol

item.title: getsentry/self-hosted
item.description: Sentry, feature-complete and packaged up for low-volume deployments and proofs-of-concept

item.title: quickemu-project/quickemu
item.description: Quickly create and run optimised Windows, macOS and Linux virtual machines

item.title: Nyr/openvpn-install
item.description: OpenVPN road warrior installer for Ubuntu, Debian, AlmaLinux, Rocky Linux, CentOS and Fedora

item.title: awslabs/amazon-eks-ami
item.description: Packer configuration for building a custom EKS AMI

item.title: SeleniumHQ/docker-selenium
item.description: Provides a simple way to run Selenium Grid with Chrome, Firefox, and Edge using Docker, making it easier to perform browser automation
